offer.name: Starter Clarity Package
offer.headline: Assessment + 3 coaching sessions
offer.proof: Assessment, written summary, and three guided sessions

creatives.message: Start with an assessment, then turn the result into three guided sessions.
creatives.imageBrief: Warm desk scene, notebook and tea, calm morning light, lots of clean negative space, no readable text.

creatives.message: A short intake and assessment helps turn vague stress into a concrete first plan.
creatives.imageBrief: Realistic editorial photo of an organized desk after decluttering, soft green and cream palette, no logos, no readable text.

creatives.message: Use a structured reflection report as the starting point for the next conversation.
creatives.imageBrief: Abstract paper report layout with blank cards and subtle lines, no words, no symbols that imply diagnosis.

creatives.message: The package gives both you and the coach a shared starting point before the conversation begins.
creatives.imageBrief: Minimal studio interior with comfortable chair and side table, bright natural light, reassuring but professional, no readable text.
